name: NSG allows unrestricted SSH access (0.0.0.0/0)
description: A Network Security Group has an inbound rule allowing SSH (TCP/22) from any source. This exposes Linux VMs to internet-wide brute-force attacks and exploitation of SSH vulnerabilities.
remediation: Remove the open SSH rule. Use Azure Bastion for SSH access. Restrict SSH source to management IP ranges. Enable JIT VM access via Defender for Cloud. Use SSH certificates instead of password auth.
